posts.title: The Power of Grace in 2026
posts.author: Rt. Rev. Dr. Bright Samuel Otso
posts.excerpt: Grace is not just a theological concept; it is the practical empowerment to live beyond human limitations...
posts.content:
Grace is not just a theological concept; it is the practical empowerment to live beyond human limitations. When we step into the sanctuary, we aren't just looking for good feelings—we are looking for transformation.

As we navigate the complexities of this year, remember that your character and charisma are fueled by the power you draw from the secret place.

Never forget that the light shines brightest in the dark. Keep your lamps burning.
